mechanism: The r-g transition provides the arithmetic context for the doom loop. When r<g, the doom loop is inactive. As r approaches g, the loop sensitizes. When r>g, the loop enters potentially explosive territory absent primary surplus adjustment.
regime_dependence: The transition point depends on the effective interest rate on outstanding debt (currently ~3.3%) converging toward marginal rates (~4.5-5.0%) as ~16% of stock reprices annually.
